rulings.Case Title: OREGON MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY VS. BRUCE I. GILBERT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 29, 2018, Line 5. DEFENDANT SUNSET SCAVENGER COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Moving party fails to allege any facts giving rise to a duty/actionable breach of duty, not any basis for strict liability. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GUILLERMO SEGURA VS. EVA NUNEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 29, 2018, Line 8. DEFENDANT RAMON LOPEZ'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action based on CCP 1161a(b). Factual disputes such as Defendant's tenancy cannot be properly addressed on a demurrer. =(501/REQ)
